title: Cryptool to host Binance Live AMA with CEO Ron Zabel on 14 September
content_html:
Cryptool is hosting a Binance Live AMA on 14 September 2024 at 14:00 UTC.

CEO Ron Zabel will run through the live platform, the modules shipping over the next quarter and where Cryptool fits into the wider investment landscape. The session is structured in three parts: an introduction segment, an X questions segment and live audience Q&A.

The AMA runs on the official Binance Live room and will be open to anyone. Bring real questions.
author: Cryptool
